speaking.descriptor: Produces short phrases about daily topics. Good pronunciation but limited range.

writing.descriptor: Writes isolated words and very short sentences. Spelling inconsistent. Needs sentence frames.

reading.descriptor: Recognizes key vocabulary. Reads simple familiar texts with picture support.

strengths: Strong pronunciation and willingness to speak
Good receptive vocabulary (understands more than he produces)
growth_areas: Written production — needs more practice with sentence-level writing
Engagement fluctuates — some days refuses to participate
Needs support transitioning from oral to written

rti_status.recommended_change: monitor — engagement concern may warrant Tier 2

next_quarter_goals: Produce 3+ complete sentences independently in writing
Participate in at least 3 paired reading sessions per week
Build vocabulary range: 10 new high-frequency words per unit
teacher_notes: This teacher consistently weights speaking highest (0.40) because the programme is immersion-first. Writing gets 0.30 because at G3 the primary mode is still oral. Strengths section always uses asset-based language ('strong', 'good', 'responds well'). Growth areas are never framed as deficits.
